title: Torta's Enchantment Glint
description: glow and glint enchantments like a&s👀
body:
## About
This is a glint/glow enchantment for your tools or armor inspired by the texture in Actions & Stuff‼️

![yo ese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7255338d5b77460884f30dfac5cba20419b5de.png)

## Compatibility
This pack is compatible with Minecraft 1.21.5 and above, and works well alongside most other visual resource packs.

## Dependencies
- [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) (Obligatory)
- [Enchantment Outline](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-glint-outline) (Optional)
- [VFX+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-effects-plus) (Optional)
